variants.title: HiFi Filter SAEP 011008 Vacuator Valve
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAEP 011008 Vacuator Valve. Easy to install and replace, the SAEP 011008 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: VACUATOR VALVE, Dimension 1 (D1): 58.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 50.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 43.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 47.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 18.0 mm
